verses.text: Abraham' suan David, David' suan Jesuh Khrih' khang ciamtehna hih bang ahi hi
Abraham ta Isaac, Isaac ta Jakob, Jakob ta Judah, leh a sanggamte ahi uh hi
Judah ta Perez leh Zerah hi a, Tamar tawh a neih a ta ahi uh hi. Perez ta Hezron, Hezron ta Ram
Ram ta Amminadab, Amminadab ta Nahshon, Nahshon ta Salmon
Salmon ta Boaz, Rahab tawh a neih a ta ahi hi. Boaz ta Obed, Ruth tawh a neih a ta ahi hi. Obed ta Jessi
Jessi ta kumpi David ahi hi. David ta Solomon, Uriah' zi Bathsheba tawh a neih pen ahi hi
Solomon ta Rehoboam, Rehoboam ta Abijah, Abijah ta Asa
Asa ta Jehoshafat, Jehoshafat ta Joram, Joram ta Uzziah
Uzziah ta Jotham, Jotham ta Ahaz, Ahaz ta Hezekiah
Hezekiah ta Manasseh, Manasseh ta Amon, Amon ta Josiah
Josiah ta Jekhoniah leh a sanggamte hi a, Babylon gamah Israel mite salin a kipaipih hun pawlin a suak ahi uh hi
Jekhoniah ta Shealtiel, Shealtiel ta Zerubbabel
Zerubbabel ta Abiud, Abiud ta Eliakim, Eliakim ta Azor
Azor ta Zadok, Zadok ta Akhim, Akhim ta Eliud
Eliud ta Eleazer, Eleazer ta Matthan, Matthan ta Jakob
Jakob ta Josef hi a, Josef pen Khrih a kici Jesuh' nu Mary' pasal ahi hi

Hih bang ahih manin Abraham panin David ciangdong khang sawmleli pha a, David panin Babylon gamah salin a kipaikhiatpih dong khang sawmleli mah pha a, Babylon gamah salin a kipaikhiatpih-a kipanin Khrih a suah hun ciangdong khang sawmleli mah a pha hi.
Jesuh Khrih a hong suahna zia hih bang ahi hi. Mary pen Josef-a' dingin zuthawl piaksa hi a, ahi zongin a kiten' taktak ma-un Kha Siangtho in amah a gaisakna thu Mary in a thei hi
A lawmpa Josef pen a manin a gamta nuam mi khat ahih manin a lawmnu maizumsak nuamlo a, kuama theihlohin maksim dingin a ngaihsun hi

Ahi zongin hih bangin thu a ngaihsut laitakin a mang sungah Topa' vantung mi khat hong kilang a, “David suan Josef aw, Mary sunga nau pen Kha Siangtho in a gaisak ahih manin amah ten'pih ngamlah kei in
Amah in tapa khat hong nei ding a, tua tapa in ama mite a mawhna uh panin honkhia ding ahih manin ama min dingin Jesuh na phuak ding hi,” ci-in thu a gen hi
Topa in kamsangpa tung tawnin a gensa thu a tun' theihna dingin hih thute a piang ahi hi. Tua a genna-ah
“Nungak khat gai-in tapa khat nei ding a, ama min dingin Emmanuel kiphuak ding hi,” ci hi. Emmanuel a khiatna in, eite tawh Pasian hong omkhawm hi, a cihna ahi hi
Josef zong a khan'lawh ciangin Topa' vantung mi' sawl bangin a zi a la hi
Ahi zongin tua tapa a suah hun dongin a zi luppihlo a, a suah ciangin a min dingin Jesuh a phuak hi.
